notes: The source CSV does not contain column headers.
Identifiers are represented as strings to preserve leading zeros.
Blank values, SAP NULL literals, and zero dates are represented as JSON null.
Clearly identifiable contract, PO, supplier, route, deadline, milestone-progress, and status fields are explicitly named.
Headerless milestone date columns 33 through 78 and ownership/classification columns 83 through 88 are preserved by source position to avoid assigning unsupported business labels.
The response contains the complete exported dataset in one page; production APIs should apply server-side pagination.
